name: N.E.S.T RPG (TF ROTF)
description:
A RPG based around the beginning of Transformers Revenge Of The Fallen where a successful mission has just been carried out and all forces are returning to base.

Shoutout to Transformers RP by @Dharakjoo It's lit and i keep thinking about all the good times i've had using it.

Not dead! Just kinda lost on bot ideas but i wanted to crank this out before my birthday soon. This is a open scenario kinda bot since you could probably just use this as a Bayverse RPG, but i just wish NEST got more time as humans actually capable of kicking chrome. I guess i'm offically the robo-banger now.

Was rewatching the Bayverse movies and actually grew to judge them less harshly. Maybe i'll make a Seymour Simmons bot because he is a GOAT among human characters. DOTM will always be my favorite Bayverse film tho.

'Member Studio Series NEST? I 'member. I wish it continued even if it was just repaints of figures. It could have added some new lore, and that NEST paintjob? Absolute fire. Imagine the new figures we could have gotten if NEST became a subset and got entire remolds and lore for figures. Like the Arcee sisters as actual full-blown military vehicles or Jolt as a tactical buggy, not to mention all the possible original characters. I certainly would have liked that over whatever the hell Studio Series does now. I can only love the 86 movie so much before i wish i died with Optimus. Is Studio Series really running out of characters in the Bayverse? Bullscrap. How about some of the minor characters? Devcon? ANY CHARACTERS from AOE or TLK? The Slagging Mountain Dew machine bot? Shane's car? Surely the guys at Hasbro can have some original ideas at the price tag of just the Deluxe class figures. Leader Class is like looking at a fake diamond for some people nowadays, the designs are alright and the price is set by Swindle.

Sorry about the rant, i just miss NEST SS and how SS used to be about the actual Bayverse movies over whatever they do now. Gamer Edition is kinda a hit or miss for me, and i'm still waiting on Reactivate, believe it or not. I'd rather have a compete game with no development reports over a game that has too many deadlines. If just one SD Dev said "Hey, this game is still alive." then i'd be happy. Just hope there will be plently of DLC for tons of new characters. My fembot Chromia finally got her break in ONE and now i wanna keep this appearance streak going now she's kinda getting more mainstream. That's my girl, you know? I've been growing to like Drift as my favorite Mech but Chromia is my top Femme. This is dragging on, isn't it? Sorry. I love making bots and everywhere i go, i see some of my favorite creators going through real struggles and even considering leaving. To my fellow creators, never stop believing in yourself! You make somebody's day even if you think you just post Horni bots. I'll probably quit one day, but i'll do it with a smile remembering all these bots. If you are leaving, thanks for all the memories and the joy you gave us. To any bot creators still struggling like us all, you are not alone and remember that we all go through trials to make us who we are.

Never give up without remembering to smile at all your accomplishments however small and use that energy push through your last hurdles!

YOU CAN WIN IF DARE!

Happy Holidays, Mechs and Femmes! I'm going to go celebrate Chromia winning the Iacon 500, and then pray to Primus that humanity invents Headmaster/Powermaster technology so we can all be cool Cybertronians or something equally as badass/horni.(I've been drunk on Chromia winning the Iacon 500 since seeing ONE, if you are wondering why this whole thing reads like a slagging fever dream.)
creator: HereFor@TfGuy
